Kuun-Lan

Faction / Organisation · First seen 3303-10-06 · 2 mentions
Active: 3303-10-06 → 3303-10-13

HIP 104292
L
Lomonosov City
Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3303-10-13
Galactic News Kuun Lan Campaign Concludes
The Kuun-Lan's appeal for commodities concluded successfully with a massive influx of deliveries to Lomonosov City. The organisation expressed gratitude to all participating pilots.
3303-10-06
Community Goal Growing Independence
The Kuun-Lan, an independent faction established by the S'jett family in HIP 104292 after being driven from their home system by Federal-Imperial conflict, has announced plans to establish an agricultural network. The faction's new home has become a haven for miners and traders but lacks a reliable food source.
